titleStmt.title: SII 24.644: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 644. (A.R. No. 443 of 1954-55.) STONE NEAR THE BUS STOP CLOSE TO THE RĀYAGŌPURAM LINTEL. AT THE MAIN ENTRANCE INTO THE CHOULTRY

summary.p: Records that the eleven free Rāmānujakūṭam in the Mūṅgikkuttu street at Śrīraṅgam were endowed by the 24 families of the Erumaikāra-Nāyakkar from the eleven places, namely, Kaṇṇanūr, Kuḍagu, Māṉantavāḍi, Nīlagiri, Kaḷḷikkōṭṭai, Pāḷakkāḍu, Paḻani, Tiṇḍukkallu, Madurai, Sevagaṅgai and Kollam The record is in late characters and bears no date.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cikāmācciyammaṉ vaṟappiṟacātattiṉāle piṟanta cāntakulam
2 10 4 maṇaiyāṟuṭaiya taṟumam ciṟaṅkattil muṅkikuttut teṟuvil
kaṇṇaṉūr kuṭaku māṉantavāṭi nīlakiṟi kaḷḷikkoṭṭai pālakkāṭu pa
ḻaṇi tiṇṭukkallu marutai cevakaṅkai kollam yinta 10 1 Ūṟilirunta
kappaṭṭa yeṟumakāṟa ṉāyakkaṟkaḷuṭaiya 10 1 taṟmaṟāmāṉuciya kū
ṭam yitukku yātāmoruvaṉ yiṭaru caiyitāl makattākiya [toṣa]tti
le peravākaṉ mantālu pamṟāku ṉāyakkaṟ kāḷappaṉāyakkaṟ tiṇṭu
kkallu marutaiṉāyakkaṟ yinta muṇuperumiruntu kāṟiyum pāttāṟkaḷ
Digital edition of SII 24.644 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
